Short CV

She was born in 1985 and graduated from Department of Midwifery in Kahramanmaraş Sutcu Imam University in 2010. She worked in public in 2011-2012. In 2018, Okan University completed a Master of Health Administration. In 2013 she started to work as a lecturer at Usküdar University Vocational School of Health Services and continues in this position.
